# Application Development Panel (ADP)

> ADP is a universal, framework-agnostic PHP debugging and development panel. It collects runtime data (logs, events, requests, exceptions, database queries, etc.) from applications via 28 collectors and provides a web UI with 20+ live inspector pages, 40+ REST/SSE API endpoints, and an MCP server for AI assistant integration. Adapters exist for Symfony, Laravel, Yii 3, and Yii 2.

## Overview

- [Getting Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/getting-started.md): Installation and quick start for each framework
- [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/architecture.md): Five-layer architecture (Kernel, API, Adapter, Frontend, MCP)
- [Data Flow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/data-flow.md): How runtime data flows from app to UI
- [Feature Matrix](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/feature-matrix.md): Collector and feature support per framework
- [Contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/contributing.md): Development setup, coding conventions, CI pipeline

## Core Modules

- [Kernel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Kernel/CLAUDE.md): Core engine — debugger lifecycle, 28 collectors, storage, proxy system
- [API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/API/CLAUDE.md): HTTP layer — REST endpoints, SSE, middleware, response wrapping
- [MCP Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/McpServer/CLAUDE.md): AI assistant integration via Model Context Protocol (stdio + HTTP)
- [CLI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Cli/CLAUDE.md): Console commands — debug server, reset, broadcast, query, serve
- [Frontend](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/frontend/CLAUDE.md): React 18 SPA — debug viewer, inspector pages, LLM chat, toolbar

## Framework Adapters

- [Symfony Adapter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Adapter/Symfony/CLAUDE.md): Symfony 6.4+/7.x/8.x — Bundle, Doctrine, Twig, Security, Messenger
- [Laravel Adapter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Adapter/Laravel/CLAUDE.md): Laravel 11+/12.x — ServiceProvider, event listeners, auto-discovery
- [Yiisoft Adapter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Adapter/Yiisoft/CLAUDE.md): Yii 3 — Config plugin, container proxy, reference adapter
- [Yii2 Adapter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Adapter/Yii2/CLAUDE.md): Yii 2.0.50+ — BootstrapInterface, Module, log/profiling targets
- [Cycle Adapter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Adapter/Cycle/CLAUDE.md): Cycle ORM — database schema provider only

## Testing & Quality

- [Testing Library](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/libs/Testing/CLAUDE.md): Test fixtures, runner, CLI command for E2E scenarios
- [CI & Tooling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/ci-and-tooling.md): GitHub Actions, Mago, PHPUnit, Vitest, code quality

## Design & Roadmap

- [MCP Server Plan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/mcp-server-plan.md): MCP server design — phases, tools, resources
- [Roadmap](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/roadmap.md): Future plans and priorities
- [Architectural Constraints](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel/main/docs/architectural-constraints.md): Dependency rules and module boundaries
